curation_notes: The patch commit includes several unrelated changes (AnonCA support, README typo fix, phpstan config, otherUI property, user ID length validation) alongside the security fix. The vulnerability-relevant changes are in AuthenticatorAssertionResponseValidator and AuthenticatorAttestationResponseValidator, where comments stating 'Nothing to do. The verification of the bit is done during the authenticator data loading' were replaced with actual Assertion::true() calls checking isUserPresent(). Pre-assigned class auth-bypass (CWE-863) is correct — the missing user presence check allows authentication without physical user interaction.
